auth.label: API Key
auth.description: RAWG API key passed as the key query parameter. Get it from https://rawg.io/apidocs.

actions.name: get_developer
actions.description: Get detailed information for one developer from RAWG.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one developer from RAWG.

developer.description: Detailed directory payload returned by RAWG.

outputSchema.description: Detailed developer response returned by RAWG.

actions.name: list_developers
actions.description: List game developers from RAWG.

page.description: The 1-based page number to retrieve from RAWG.

pageSize.description: The number of items to return per page from RAWG, between 1 and 40.

ordering.description: Ordering field passed through to RAWG developers listing.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing developers from RAWG.

count.description: Total number of matching resources returned by RAWG.

anyOf.description: Next page URL returned by RAWG.
Previous page URL returned by RAWG.

id.description: Unique integer identifier returned by RAWG.

games_count.description: Number of related games returned by RAWG when present.

image_background.description: Background image URL returned by RAWG when present.

metacritic.description: Metacritic score returned by RAWG when present.

released.description: Release date returned by RAWG when present.

language.description: Language code returned by RAWG when present.

items.description: A summary resource returned by RAWG list endpoints.

outputSchema.description: Paginated developers list returned by RAWG.

actions.name: list_game_movies
actions.description: Get the RAWG movie payload for one game.

anyOf.description: Positive numeric RAWG game identifier.
RAWG game slug.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one non-paginated RAWG game subresource.

id.description: Unique movie identifier returned by RAWG.

name.description: Movie or trailer title returned by RAWG.

preview.description: Preview image URL returned by RAWG when present.

480.description: 480p trailer URL returned by RAWG when present.

max.description: Highest-quality trailer URL returned by RAWG when present.

data.description: Nested movie stream URLs returned by RAWG.

movie.description: Movie resource returned by RAWG for one game.

outputSchema.description: Movie response documented by RAWG for one game.

actions.name: list_game_reddit_posts
actions.description: Get the RAWG Reddit post payload for one game.

anyOf.description: Positive numeric RAWG game identifier.
RAWG game slug.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one non-paginated RAWG game subresource.

id.description: Unique Reddit post identifier returned by RAWG.

name.description: Reddit post title returned by RAWG.

url.description: Reddit post URL returned by RAWG when present.

text.description: Reddit post body text returned by RAWG when present.

image.description: Preview image URL returned by RAWG when present.

created.description: Post creation timestamp returned by RAWG when present.

username.description: Reddit author username returned by RAWG when present.

username_url.description: RAWG author profile URL returned by RAWG when present.

post.description: Reddit post resource returned by RAWG for one game.

outputSchema.description: Reddit post response documented by RAWG for one game.

actions.name: list_game_screenshots
actions.description: List screenshots for one RAWG game.

anyOf.description: Positive numeric RAWG game identifier.
RAWG game slug.

page.description: The 1-based page number to retrieve from RAWG.

pageSize.description: The number of items to return per page from RAWG, between 1 and 40.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing one paginated RAWG game subresource.

count.description: Total number of matching resources returned by RAWG.

anyOf.description: Next page URL returned by RAWG.
Previous page URL returned by RAWG.

id.description: Unique integer identifier returned by RAWG.

image.description: Screenshot image URL returned by RAWG.

width.description: Screenshot width returned by RAWG when present.

height.description: Screenshot height returned by RAWG when present.

is_deleted.description: Whether RAWG marks the screenshot as deleted when present.

outputSchema.description: Paginated screenshots list returned by RAWG.

actions.name: list_game_stores
actions.description: List stores for one RAWG game.

anyOf.description: Positive numeric RAWG game identifier.
RAWG game slug.

page.description: The 1-based page number to retrieve from RAWG.

pageSize.description: The number of items to return per page from RAWG, between 1 and 40.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing one paginated RAWG game subresource.

count.description: Total number of matching resources returned by RAWG.

anyOf.description: Next page URL returned by RAWG.
Previous page URL returned by RAWG.

id.description: Unique game-store relation identifier returned by RAWG.

url.description: Store URL returned by RAWG for the game relation.

id.description: Unique store identifier returned by RAWG.

domain.description: Store domain returned by RAWG when present.

games_count.description: Number of games linked to the store returned by RAWG when present.

image_background.description: Store background image URL returned by RAWG when present.

store.description: Nested store resource returned by RAWG.

items.description: Store relation resource returned by RAWG for one game.

stores.description: Store relation resources returned by RAWG.

outputSchema.description: Paginated stores list returned by RAWG.

actions.name: list_games
actions.description: List games from RAWG with optional search, filtering, sorting, and pagination.

search.description: Search query used to match game titles in RAWG.

page.description: The 1-based page number to retrieve from RAWG.

pageSize.description: The number of items to return per page from RAWG, between 1 and 40.

platforms.description: Comma-separated platform identifiers or slugs used to filter games.

genres.description: Comma-separated genre identifiers or slugs used to filter games.

stores.description: Comma-separated store identifiers used to filter games.

developers.description: Comma-separated developer identifiers or slugs used to filter games.

publishers.description: Comma-separated publisher identifiers or slugs used to filter games.

tags.description: Comma-separated tag identifiers or slugs used to filter games.

dates.description: Release date range in YYYY-MM-DD,YYYY-MM-DD format used to filter games.

ordering.description: Ordering field passed through to RAWG game listing.

metacritic.description: Metacritic score range in min,max format used to filter games.

parentPlatforms.description: Comma-separated parent platform identifiers used to filter games.

searchExact.description: Whether to request exact game name matching from RAWG.

searchPrecise.description: Whether to disable fuzzy search behavior in RAWG.

excludeAdditions.description: Whether to exclude additions and DLC resources.

excludeParents.description: Whether to exclude parent games with additions.

excludeGameSeries.description: Whether to exclude entries that belong to game series.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing games from RAWG.

count.description: Total number of matching resources returned by RAWG.

anyOf.description: Next page URL returned by RAWG.
Previous page URL returned by RAWG.

id.description: Unique integer identifier returned by RAWG.

games_count.description: Number of related games returned by RAWG when present.

image_background.description: Background image URL returned by RAWG when present.

metacritic.description: Metacritic score returned by RAWG when present.

released.description: Release date returned by RAWG when present.

language.description: Language code returned by RAWG when present.

items.description: A summary resource returned by RAWG list endpoints.

outputSchema.description: Paginated games list returned by RAWG.
